name: datamanager
description: Windows data schema and generation desktop application built with Tauri 2
author: hhhhm8826

scripts.format: pnpm --filter @datamanager/core format && pnpm --filter @datamanager/desktop format && prettier --write tests/e2e tests/baseline tests/tauri-rewrite scripts/regenerate-rewrite-fixtures.ts tests/fixtures/m0-legacy/README.md tests/fixtures/m8-rewrite/README.md tsconfig.scripts.json && cargo fmt
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter @datamanager/core format:check && pnpm --filter @datamanager/desktop format:check && prettier --check tests/e2e tests/baseline tests/tauri-rewrite scripts/regenerate-rewrite-fixtures.ts tests/fixtures/m0-legacy/README.md tests/fixtures/m8-rewrite/README.md tsconfig.scripts.json && cargo fmt --check
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @datamanager/core lint && pnpm --filter @datamanager/desktop lint && pnpm run lint:e2e && pnpm run lint:fixtures
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @datamanager/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @datamanager/desktop typecheck && pnpm run typecheck:fixtures
scripts.test: pnpm run test:baseline && pnpm --filter @datamanager/core test && pnpm --filter @datamanager/desktop test && pnpm run test:rewrite:m1 && pnpm run test:rewrite:m2 && pnpm run test:rewrite:m3 && pnpm run test:rewrite:m4 && pnpm run test:rewrite:m5 && pnpm run test:rewrite:m6 && pnpm run test:rewrite:m7 && pnpm run test:rewrite:m8 && pnpm fixtures:rewrite:check
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @datamanager/desktop exec tauri build --features e2e --no-bundle --config src-tauri/tauri.e2e.conf.json && pnpm --filter @datamanager/desktop test:e2e
